must_detect.matched_text: Lautan Cerah Holdings Berhad Privacy Notice and DSAR/Retention Workflow (Malaysia PDPA; Capital Markets and Services Act) for employment, financing, and issuer disclosure contexts.

Purposes include HR administration, negotiating financing, M&A evaluations, and compliance with the Listing Requirements of the Malaysian exchange, including preparation of immediate announcements for material information relating to our securities.

Retention: HR files 7 years post-termination; financing and security documents 7 years after maturity; investor relations correspondence 3 years; MNPI working papers kept until 2 years after the relevant public release on the Exchange plus completion of audit or review.

Lautan Cerah Holdings Berhad Privacy Notice and DSAR/Retention Workflow (Malaysia PDPA; Capital Markets and Services Act) for employment, financing, and issuer disclosure contexts.
We process personal data relating directly or indirectly to identifiable individuals (PDPA), including employee records, board and management contacts, investor relations queries, supplier KYC, device identifiers, and communications metadata.
Purposes include HR administration, negotiating financing, M&A evaluations, and compliance with the Listing Requirements of the Malaysian exchange, including preparation of immediate announcements for material information relating to our securities.
MNPI handling: undisclosed financials, draft term sheets, C-suite remuneration adjustments, or selective briefings are treated as non-public material information; no selective disclosure is permitted; closed period restrictions apply for 30 days before quarterly results; staff and directors are subject to insider trading prohibitions under the capital markets laws.
Submit DSARs to Pn. Nor Aulia Rahman, Data Protection Officer: pdpa@lautan-cerah.com.my or by post to Level 17, Menara Purnama, 9 Jalan Selasih 12, 47577 Bandar Cahaya, Selangor, Malaysia.
We target a response within 21 days and may defer or refuse to provide MNPI until an immediate announcement is made via the Exchange; where information is public, we will provide the public source instead of duplicating records.
Public-status example: Q2 FY2026 revenue guidance was publicly announced on 7 March 2026 via the Exchange’s electronic announcement system and is not MNPI; general press articles on nationwide port congestion are not issuer-specific and do not constitute MNPI.
Retention: HR files 7 years post-termination; financing and security documents 7 years after maturity; investor relations correspondence 3 years; MNPI working papers kept until 2 years after the relevant public release on the Exchange plus completion of audit or review.
Cross-border transfers: personal data may be processed by Nusantara DataHub Pte Ltd (our processor) in Kota Samudera, Lydora; transfers outside Malaysia will comply with PDPA requirements (comparable protection, contractual safeguards, and audit rights).
DSAR limitations: we may withhold third-party data, legally privileged material, or information whose disclosure would contravene the Listing Requirements or capital markets laws; we will provide summaries where feasible.
Blackout windows: Compliance maintains an insider and restricted list; employment offers with equity-linked terms during a blackout are treated as MNPI until the relevant announcement is released.
